ogTitle: Bilambil Heights vs Bilgola Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bilambil Heights and Bilgola Beach.
heading: Bilambil Heights vs Bilgola Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bilambil Heights, New South Wales and Bilgola Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bilgola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Bilambil Heights (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bilambil Heights or Bilgola Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bilambil Heights has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Bilgola Beach scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bilambil Heights scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Bilgola Beach scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bilambil Heights or Bilgola Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bilgola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
